milestone: v2_6_134 — Engine Ballad Audible Classic Brush Fill Rework
scope: Rework Jazz Ballad classic brush fills from metadata-only overlays into an audible foreground fill lane: background snare sweep is ducked inside the fill window, fill dynamics use a clear pickup→drag→release contour, and all offbeats keep shared swing-8 timing. No custom brush voices, no chord-region fill loop, and no piano/bass/voicing/API/Agent/HarmonyOS change.
